commands.review_summary:
The PR wraps global undici EnvHttpProxyAgent dispatchers with OpenClaw matchesNoProxy bypass routing, updates lowercase no_proxy precedence, and expands proxy dispatcher coverage.

PR surface: Source +129, Tests +82. Total +211 across 3 files.

Reproducibility: no. high-confidence full qqbot/COS reproduction was run in this review. The source path is credible and the PR body includes live proxy/global-dispatcher output, but the exact reported media upload failure still needs maintainer-quality confirmation against the chosen canonical fix.
